data: {"generalSituation":"An active southwesterly airstream will continue to bring showers and thunderstorms to the coast of Guangdong today and tomorrow. With the southwesterly airstream weakening gradually and an anticyclone aloft extending westwards, there will still be a few showers over the region from the weekend to early next week. There will be sunny intervals. The anticyclone aloft will cover Guangdong in the middle and latter parts of next week. The weather will be very hot during the day over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260716","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4, occasionally force 5 offshore.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and a few squally thunderstorms.
